commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Righteousness exalts a nation: but sin is a reproach to any people. This sentence ought to be engraven in all public places. Hebrew, "and mercy the sinful people "whom God spares on account of their alms-deeds, (Daniel iv. ) or "sin is the shame of peoples. "(Calmet) Montanus renders chesed mercy, and Pagnin "ignominy. "The former is scarcely intelligible, et misericordia populorum peccatum, unless sin be here taken for a sin-offering, (Haydock) as it is by Vatable, Grotius (Calmet).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
